violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Establishment does not have an individual with Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. Establishment to register an individual. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Food contact surfaces of the tomato slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Tomato slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the 2 door cold drawer refrigeration unit (on online makeline). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
Handsink in back prep area observed leaking from faucet base when in use. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) observed with food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2023

Blade of the can opener observed not in good repair. Blade observed with peeled coating. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. -Establishment shall not use can opener until blade has been repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023

The condensate from the walk-in cooler observed draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. -Per interview of staff, service has been contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
